The relevance criteria include real-time outage reports, user-generated problem descriptions (especially from the 58000 postcode area), and official updates from SFR or third-party monitoring platforms. The user may also be interested in the duration, scope, and resolution status of the reported issues, as well as any communication from SFR customer support regarding the situation.

title: Oil Lamp Safety
description: What are the key safety precautions for using and maintaining an oil lamp to prevent fire hazards and ensure safe operation?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive guidance on safely operating an oil lamp, particularly focusing on best practices to mitigate fire risks and ensure reliable performance. Relevance is determined by documents that provide clear, actionable safety tips—such as proper oil filling, wick maintenance, avoiding unattended use, and safe storage—especially those emphasizing the use of refined white petroleum and correct wick preparation. The user likely intends to use an oil lamp for ambient lighting in a home or decorative setting and wants to avoid accidents, particularly in households with children or pets. Documents that include technical details about lamp construction, fuel types, or maintenance routines that directly contribute to safe usage are considered highly relevant.

title: Van Rental in Lanzarote
description: What are the best options and pricing for renting a van at Lanzarote Airport in Puerto del Carmen, including availability, rental conditions, and age restrictions?
narrative: A user is planning a group trip to Lanzarote and needs a large vehicle to transport 10-12 passengers, possibly including luggage and equipment. They require detailed information on van rental options at Lanzarote Airport, specifically focusing on availability, pricing (e.g., the current rate of $43.45/day for a Citroen C4 Picasso), rental agencies (such as Enterprise), and key conditions like age requirements (typically 25–70 years), documentation needed (valid driver’s license, passport, credit card), and whether one-way rentals are available. The user also wants to compare off-airport options for potentially better rates and understand any additional fees or restrictions, such as young or elderly driver surcharges. Relevance is determined by documents that provide clear details on van rental models, pricing, agency information, and logistical requirements at Lanzarote Airport and nearby locations.

title: Potato Cultivation Timing
description: What is the optimal timing and method for planting potatoes based on regional climate, lunar cycles, and variety-specific requirements?
narrative: The user is a home gardener or small-scale farmer seeking detailed, practical guidance on when and how to plant potatoes effectively. They are interested in region-specific planting windows (e.g., northern vs. southern France, Belgium, or Quebec), the influence of lunar cycles on germination and harvesting, and the importance of selecting appropriate potato varieties (e.g., Vitelotte for purees, Gourmandine for early harvest). The user also wants to understand preparatory steps such as soil loosening, screening, and proper spacing to ensure high-quality yields. Relevance is determined by documents that provide actionable planting schedules, climate adaptation advice, lunar calendar guidance, and variety-specific cultivation tips, including pre-germination techniques for new potatoes and best practices for soil preparation and harvesting.

title: Employment Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and criteria for job seekers to receive a €1,000 bonus for entering qualified training with a guaranteed job offer?
narrative: A job seeker is looking to re-enter the workforce after a period of unemployment and is interested in a government incentive program offering a €1,000 bonus. The user wants to understand the specific eligibility requirements, such as the type of training (qualified, company-based), the nature of the employment commitment (guaranteed job offer), and the sectors involved (e.g., digital, ecological transition, care). They also want to know the disbursement schedule (two-stage release) and how the bonus aims to support individuals who face financial or logistical barriers to training. Relevance is determined by documents that detail the conditions, target groups (including DELDs), and implementation of the bonus, particularly those outlining the training and employment linkage, financial disbursement, and qualifying sectors.
